title: GenHome3D-1280
excerpt: 1,280 validated USDZ assets for spatial prototyping, simulation, and research.
content_html:
Open 3D asset collection · v1.0

Built for rooms.
Ready for spaces.

A carefully structured collection of 1,280 household objects in USDZ—each generated, packaged, and reviewed through the same reproducible pipeline.

CC BY 4.0 · Metric scale · Self-contained textures · RealityKit-oriented

01

Loading collectionUSDZ

02

Loading collectionUSDZ

03

Loading collectionUSDZ

1,280validated assets

64focused categories

20assets per category

USDZportable delivery format

The library

Find the piece your space needs.

Search by name or asset ID, narrow by category, and download any object directly from GitHub.

1,280 objects

One shared contract

A dataset is only useful when its rules are visible.

Every asset follows a fixed production path—from authored dimensions and a generated design reference to Blender construction, USDZ sealing, and evidence-bound review.

Read the validation notes

  1. 01

    Specify

    Stable IDs, metric dimensions, topology constraints, and category coverage.

  2. 02

    Generate

    AI-assisted references and procedural Blender construction with authored materials.

  3. 03

    Package

    Self-contained USDZ delivery with texture, stage, bounds, and archive checks.

  4. 04

    Review

    Seven visual criteria, technical evidence seals, and collection-level regression tests.

Use it well

Open enough to build on.
Documented enough to trust.

Assets are available under CC BY 4.0. Credit “GenHome3D-1280 contributors” and link to the repository when you redistribute or adapt them.

Packages are structurally validated for USDZ workflows. Apple Vision Pro on-device review remains pending and is not implied by this release.
content_text: Open 3D asset collection · v1.0 Built for rooms. Ready for spaces. A carefully structured collection of 1,280 household objects in USDZ—each generated, packaged, and reviewed through the same reproducible pipeline. CC BY 4.0 · Metric scale · Self-contained textures · RealityKit-oriented 01 Loading collectionUSDZ 02 Loading collectionUSDZ 03 Loading collectionUSDZ 1,280validated assets 64focused categories 20assets per category USDZportable delivery format The library Find the piece your space needs. Search by name or asset ID, narrow by category, and download any object directly from GitHub. Search assets Filter by category 1,280 objects One shared contract A dataset is only useful when its rules are visible. Every asset follows a fixed production path—from authored dimensions and a generated design reference to Blender construction, USDZ sealing, and evidence-bound review. Read the validation notes 01SpecifyStable IDs, metric dimensions, topology constraints, and category coverage. 02GenerateAI-assisted references and procedural Blender construction with authored materials. 03PackageSelf-contained USDZ delivery with texture, stage, bounds, and archive checks. 04ReviewSeven visual criteria, technical evidence seals, and collection-level regression tests. Use it well Open enough to build on.Documented enough to trust. Assets are available under CC BY 4.0. Credit “GenHome3D-1280 contributors” and link to the repository when you redistribute or adapt them. Packages are structurally validated for USDZ workflows. Apple Vision Pro on-device review remains pending and is not implied by this release.

content_html_zh:
开放3D资产集合·v1.0

专为房间而建。 准备好空间。

USDZ 中精心构建的 1,280 件家居用品集合 - 每一件都通过相同的可复制管道生成、打包和审查。

CC BY 4.0 · 公制尺度 · 独立纹理 · 面向 RealityKit

01

加载收藏USDZ

02

加载收藏USDZ

03

加载收藏USDZ

1,280 个已验证资产

64个重点类别

每个类别 20 个资产

USDZ便携式交付格式

图书馆

找到您的空间需要的部件。

按名称或资产 ID 搜索，按类别缩小范围，并直接从 GitHub 下载任何对象。

搜索资产 按类别过滤

1,280 个对象

一份共享合同

数据集仅在其规则可见时才有用。

每项资产都遵循固定的生产路径 - 从编写的尺寸和生成的设计参考到 Blender 构建、USDZ 密封和证据绑定审查。

阅读验证说明

  1. 01指定稳定 ID、度量维度、拓扑约束和类别覆盖范围。
  2. 02使用编写的材料生成人工智能辅助参考和程序性搅拌机构造。
  3. 03Package独立的 USDZ 交付，具有纹理、阶段、边界和存档检查。
  4. 04回顾七项视觉标准、技术证据印章和馆藏级回归测试。

好好利用它

足够开放，可以继续构建。有足够的文档，值得信任。

资产可在 CC BY 4.0 下使用。 当您重新分发或改编它们时，请注明“GenHome3D-1280 贡献者”并链接到存储库。

软件包针对 USDZ 工作流程进行了结构验证。 Apple Vision Pro 设备上的审核仍在等待中，本次发布并不暗示。
